label: Clari
description: Connect Clari to pull pipeline forecasts, deal signals, and revenue intelligence into Anton.

form.title: Connect Clari
form.subtitle: Paste your Clari API key and tenant slug to start syncing forecast and pipeline data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Clari API key and tenant slug. Generated in Settings → Integrations → API — requires admin or CSM-gated access.
methods.how_to:
## Connect Clari via API Key

Clari API access is typically admin- or CSM-gated. If the Integrations section isn't visible in your Settings, contact your Clari admin or Clari CSM to enable API access for your account.

### Steps

1. Log in to your Clari instance.
2. Click your avatar or account name (top-right) and go to **Settings**.
3. Navigate to **Integrations → API**.
4. If an API key already exists, copy it. Otherwise, click **Generate API Key** (or **Create Token**).
5. Copy the key — it may only be shown once. Store it somewhere safe.
6. Find your **Tenant Slug**: this is the subdomain of your Clari URL, e.g. `acme` from `acme.clari.com`. Your Clari admin can confirm it.
7. Paste both values into the fields below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- If you lose the API key, you'll need to regenerate it — old keys are typically invalidated on regeneration.
- API access scope depends on your Clari plan and admin configuration. If you see permission errors, ask your Clari admin to grant broader API access.
- The tenant slug is required to route requests to the correct Clari environment.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key

fields.name: tenant_slug
fields.label: Tenant Slug
